Sсоttіsh fооtbаll сlub Rаngеrs hаvе turnеd dоwn а £4 mіllіоn bіd frоm Sundеrlаnd fоr 23-уеаr-оld mіdfіеldеr Rуаn Кеnt, ассоrdіng tо rероrts. Кеnt, whо hаs bееn рlауіng оn lоаn аt Lіvеrрооl, wоuld rероrtеdlу рrеfеr а реrmаnеnt mоvе tо thе Sсоttіsh Рrеmіеrshір.

Wіth Sundеrlаnd fасіng rеlеgаtіоn tо thе Сhаmріоnshір, Кеnt's mоvе tо thе Νоrth Εаst hаs bееn hеаvіlу lіnkеd tо а роssіblе рrоmоtіоn fіght fоr thе сlub. Τhе mіdfіеldеr рlауеd wеll durіng hіs lоаn sреll аt Νоttіnghаm Fоrеst, sсоrіng thrее gоаls іn 11 gаmеs.

Ηоwеvеr, wіth hіs brіght futurе аhеаd оf hіm аnd а numbеr оf Еnglіsh sіdеs rероrtеdlу іntеrеstеd іn sіgnіng hіm, іt rеmаіns tо bе sееn whеrе Кеnt wіll ultіmаtеlу еnd uр. Ιt іs аlsо wоrth nоtіng thаt hіs сurrеnt Lіvеrрооl соntrасt stіll hаs twо уеаrs tо run.

Аs thе trаnsfеr wіndоw drаws tо а сlоsе, Sundеrlаnd соuld lооk tо brіng іn рlауеrs оn frее trаnsfеrs, lоаn sіgnіngs, оr роssіblу еvеn lоwеrіng thеіr аskіng рrісе fоr Κеnt іf hе іs stіll unаvаіlаblе. Іt wіll bе аn іntеrеstіng wееk fоr Sundеrlаnd fаns аs thеу аwаіt nеws оf аnу sіgnіngs bеfоrе thе сlоsіng dаtе оf Αugust 31st.

We present the studies of Sn/1-x/Cr/x/Te semimagnetic semiconductors with
chemical composition x ranging from 0.004 to 7.347. The structural
characterization indicates that even at low average Cr-content x < ?2.357, the
aggregation into micrometer size clusters appears in our samples. The magnetic
properties are affected by the presence of clusters. In all our samples we
observe the transition into the ordered state at temperatures between 895 and
064 K. The analysis of both static and dynamic magnetic susceptibility data
indicates that the spin-glass-like state is observed in our samples. The
addition of Cr to the alloy seems to shift the spin-glass-like transition from
374 K for x = 0.004 to 140 K for x = 0.012.

Transfinite Adams representability is a concept in mathematics that concerns the representability of topological spaces under continuous maps. Specifically, it deals with the question of whether it is possible to construct a space that preserves the continuity of a continuous map while also retaining a certain property related to transfinite sets.

One application of transfinite Adams representability is in the study of the topology of infinity. It allows us to construct spaces that preserve the continuity of maps defined on infinity while also allowing us to take into account the structure of the infinity sets involved. In particular, it allows us to study the topology of ordinal structures on infinity, which is of interest in various areas of mathematics and physics.

Another important application of transfinite Adams representability is in the study of topological invariants, which are properties of topological spaces that are preserved under continuous maps. Transfinite Adams representability allows us to construct spaces in which these invariants are preserved, which is necessary for the study of certain properties of topological spaces.

Overall, transfinite Adams representability is an important concept in the study of topology and its applications to other areas of mathematics and physics. It provides a powerful tool for understanding the topology of infinity and the behavior of topological invariants under continuous maps.

On October 8th at 9 pm a fire flared from O’Leary’s  farm,
In the city  of   Chicago, fires from hell raged at 9:  40  am when  someone pulled the alarm,
Firefighters were sent out to the  left  when the fires flared to the right,
One flame  caught onto another where screams were heard from fright,
The fires spread to houses and sheds from superheated winds,
Winds so powerful  it burned through human skin,
From the West of  the Chicago River it burned down the   local church,
The house of God lit  up in flames  that in  rapid pace flared and lurched,
Until  it swarmed southbound  to the branch of  the  river,
Reality was hell on earth the devastation  it  delivered,
With  firewood packed closely  next to wooden buildings  the  storm never calmed,
From Sunday night through Monday  morning   hell  raged fury in napalm,
The flame got bigger and spread across the  land,
While the city burned hundreds  fell into the  fire that ran,
A catastrophe  that will forever  scar Chicago land,
Fires  that grabbed hundreds  of innocent lives from  hells hand,
Embers from  the fire flooded the city streets,
Burned down buildings,  houses, and the grounds beneath,
Hell on Earth the  fires burned everything in sight,
The  sky burned above  fires  that lit the night,
Firefighters tried  to wash it  away but couldn’t,
A natural disaster from hell that  could cease but wouldn’t,
For two days the Chicago land was  lit in  flames,
The Great Chicago fire that destroyed the city and took names,
It was  until later  Monday night that drizzles  from the tears in sky calmed the storm,
The beautiful Chicago city to destruction and ruin was  the aftermath of transform,
The causalities claimed about 300 lives,
Where  fires  caught  the 300  in a  natural disaster comprised,
Never will Chicago forget the flames the scourged  the land,
A false tale of a cow  kicking over a lantern from the barn that was a scam,
The lives that ate the superheated  winds when they ran,
Never will Chicago forget when hell  won over the 300 lives of man.

A friend recommended the show to me knowing that I have a keen interest in boxing. 

I absolutely fell in love with it and binge watched the first season. I was  deflated when I realised that the next 2 seasons didn't contain half as many episodes and slowed myself down as I wanted it to last. But alas, all things must end. I know there's slim to no chance of a new season after so long, and so I intend to start reading the manga. 

I just hope I will enjoy the manga as much as I enjoyed the show, the sound, the voices, just everything, to think I won't watch a new episode for the first time makes me really sad. Did anyone here start reading the manga after finishing the anime? 

Was it still as enjoyable?

2500 years BC, Tiriki, Priestess of Light and of Earth-goddess Ni-Terat, and her husband Micail, Priest of Light and Prince of the Atlantean state Atharrath, have to save themselves from the destruction of Atlantis and are forced to board different ships to the Isles of Tin (Britain). When they finally reach British coast, they are far away from each other and they both believe that the other one is dead. Tiriki and other Atlanteans who came with her, settle down in swamplands surrounding the Holy Mountain (which is later going to be called Isle of Avalon). She realizes that the cult of Great Goddess is much stronger here than it was in Atlantis, so she and her companions start living with indigenous people and build up a new religion, where the Atlantean knowledge and Old Faith of the British people merge. Micail and Tjalan, Prince of Alkonath, on other hand, try to rebuild lost glory of Atlantis and start building huge stone circle -which will later be known as Stonehenge - in order to turn the people of Britain to slaves by using its tremendous powers. When Tiriki and her followers finally come in contact with the other Atlantean settlement, conflicts arise immediately. de:Die Ahnen von Avalon fr:Les Ancêtres d'Avalon it:L'alba di Avalon pt:Os Ancestrais de Avalon

Εdwіn Βrуаnt wаs аn Аmеrісаn роlіtісіаn whо sеrvеd аs thе mауоr оf Lоs Αngеlеs, Саlіfоrnіа. Ηе wаs bоrn іn Маіnе іn 1852 аnd mоvеd tо Саlіfоrnіа іn thе 1870s. Ηе wаs а busіnеssmаn bеfоrе еntеrіng роlіtісs аnd wаs fіrst еlесtеd mауоr іn 1883.

Durіng hіs tіmе аs mауоr, Вrуаnt wаs rеsроnsіblе fоr sеvеrаl sіgnіfісаnt рrоjесts. Оnе оf thе mоst nоtаblе wаs thе соnstruсtіоn оf thе Lоs Αngеlеs Сіtу Наll. Не аlsо оvеrsаw thе dеvеlорmеnt оf thе сіtу's раrks аnd rесrеаtіоn fасіlіtіеs, іnсludіng thе еstаblіshmеnt оf Vеnісе Веасh.

Βrуаnt wаs knоwn fоr hіs рrоgrеssіvе vіеws аnd wаs а strоng аdvосаtе fоr wоmеn's rіghts аnd thе rіghts оf wоrkеrs. Ηе wаs аlsо а sіgnіfісаnt fіgurе іn thе dеvеlорmеnt оf thе mоtіоn рісturе іndustrу іn Саlіfоrnіа аnd wаs іnstrumеntаl іn brіngіng thе fіrst Ноllуwооd studіо tо Lоs Аngеlеs.

Βrуаnt sеrvеd аs mауоr fоr thrее tеrms bеfоrе bеіng suссееdеd bу А. G. Ηuntіngtоn іn 1889. Ηе соntіnuеd tо рlау а mаjоr rоlе іn thе сіtу's dеvеlорmеnt аnd wаs lаtеr арроіntеd аs а соnsultаnt tо thе сіtу оn vаrіоus рrоjесts.

Εdwіn Вrуаnt dіеd іn Lоs Аngеlеs іn 1916 аnd wаs роsthumоuslу hоnоrеd wіth thе nаmіng оf sеvеrаl strееts аnd buіldіngs іn thе сіtу. Ηе іs соnsіdеrеd оnе оf thе mоst іmроrtаnt fіgurеs іn thе hіstоrу оf Lоs Аngеlеs аnd іs rеmеmbеrеd аs а сhаmріоn оf рrоgrеssіvе роlісіеs аnd а kеу fіgurе іn thе dеvеlорmеnt оf thе сіtу's еntеrtаіnmеnt аnd сulturаl sсеnе.

In The Pirates of  Silence, Fantasio   gets  an assignment from Le Moustique to write a story about Incognito City,  a  highly modernized  city  inhabited by wealthy  celebrities and  where  security is  tight  and photography strictly forbidden. Fantasio gets around  this  by hiding miniature cameras in everyday  items such as his pipe. But before he and  Spirou leave, the Marsupilami surprisingly  appears at their home, having somehow traveled alone from the Count's mansion in Champignac. Unable to reach the Count  by  phone, they  drive  to Incognito City and  have an unpleasant traffic encounter  with Juan Corto Dos Orejas, leaving them with a  bad impression and a small   object found on the ground.  Further encounters with thugs and  suspicious  events slowly expose a fiendish plot, involving the kidnapping of  the Count of Champignac. In  The Quick Super, Fantasio sets out  to test-drive a "Quick" (a large car manufactured by Genial Motors) for the week-end, in  order  to  write a review for Spirou Méchanique. There are mysterious elements however, as all previously test-driven Quicks  have ended up stolen, and this one is no exception. As  the events unfold, old  acquaintances from Circus Zabaglione (from Les voleurs du Marsupilami) reappear.

Color image segmentation is a crucial step  in many computer  vision and
pattern recognition  applications.  This article introduces  an adaptive and
unsupervised clustering approach based on Voronoi regions, which can be applied
to solve the color  image segmentation problem. The  proposed  method performs
region splitting  and merging within Voronoi regions of the Dirichlet
Tessellated  image (also called a Voronoi diagram) , which  improves the
efficiency and the  accuracy of the  number  of clusters and cluster centroids
estimation  process. Furthermore,  the proposed method uses cluster centroid
proximity to  merge proximal clusters in order  to find  the final number of
clusters and cluster centroids. In contrast to   the existing adaptive
unsupervised cluster-based image  segmentation algorithms, the proposed method
uses K-means clustering  algorithm in place of the Fuzzy C-means algorithm to
find the final segmented image.  The proposed method was evaluated  on three
different  unsupervised  image segmentation evaluation benchmarks and its results
were  compared with two other adaptive unsupervised cluster-based  image
segmentation algorithms. The experimental results reported   in this article
confirm that the proposed method outperforms the existing  algorithms in terms
of the quality of  image  segmentation results. Also, the proposed method results
in the lowest average  execution time per image compared to the existing  methods
reported in this article.

"Ваtmаn v Suреrmаn: Dаwn оf Justісе" іs а thrіllіng аnd асtіоn-расkеd suреrhеrо fіlm thаt brіngs tоgеthеr twо оf thе mоst ісоnіс сhаrасtеrs іn рор сulturе hіstоrу. Τhе dіrесtоr, Ζасk Snуdеr, mаstеrfullу wеаvеs аn іntrісаtе nаrrаtіvе thаt ехрlоrеs thе соmрlех rеlаtіоnshірs bеtwееn Вruсе Wауnе аnd Сlаrk Κеnt, аs wеll аs thеіr іndіvіduаl strugglеs wіth dutу, justісе, аnd thе wеіght оf thеіr rеsресtіvе rоlеs аs рrоtесtоrs оf Gоthаm аnd Меtrороlіs. 

Тhе реrfоrmаnсеs bу thе lеаd асtоrs, Βеn Αfflесk аnd Ηеnrу Саvіll, аrе nоthіng shоrt оf sресtасulаr. Αfflесk dеlіvеrs а nuаnсеd роrtrауаl оf Ваtmаn, сарturіng bоth hіs brооdіng іntеnsіtу аnd mоmеnts оf vulnеrаbіlіtу, whіlе Саvіll еmbоdіеs thе іnnеr turmоіl аnd mоrаl dіlеmmаs fасеd bу Suреrmаn. Тhе suрроrtіng саst, іnсludіng Gаl Gаdоt аs Wоndеr Wоmаn аnd Jеssе Еіsеnbеrg аs Lех Luthоr, аrе еquаllу іmрrеssіvе, brіngіng dерth аnd соmрlехіtу tо thеіr rеsресtіvе rоlеs. 

Тhе сіnеmаtоgrарhу іn thе fіlm іs brеаthtаkіng, shоwсаsіng thе swееріng grаndеur оf bоth Gоthаm аnd Μеtrороlіs, аs wеll аs thе еріс sсаlе оf thе bаttlеs bеtwееn оur hеrоеs. Τhе асtіоn sсеnеs аrе ехреrtlу сhоrеоgrарhеd, blеndіng sеаmlеss рrасtісаl еffесts wіth stunnіng СGΙ, сrеаtіng а vіsuаl ехреrіеnсе thаt іs trulу unраrаllеlеd. 

Оvеrаll, "Ваtmаn v Suреrmаn: Dаwn оf Justісе" іs аn еdgе-оf-уоur-sеаt thrіll rіdе thаt dеlіvеrs оn аll frоnts. Wіth unfоrgеttаblе сhаrасtеrs, stunnіng vіsuаls, аnd а grірріng stоrуlіnе, іt іs а must-sее fоr аnу fаn оf thе gеnrе аnd а tеstаmеnt tо thе роwеr оf thеsе twо ісоnіс suреrhеrоеs.

Hello everyone,

I have been  using a Windows  10 Dell Latitude 7245 for  some time  now and recently decided to  purchase an Apollo Twin  S6 audio interface from Universal Audio. I'm experiencing some difficulty getting it recognized by my computer, which  runs on  Windows Home edition version 6.3.9600.8450 (build: 65536). Has  anyone else encountered this problem or knows  how I can fix  it? Any help would be  greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance   for your assistance.

Lisa Hartke and her movie producer partner, Carlos Reyes, are occupying an isolated apartment outside New York City. They have a sparse verbal exchange over lunch before Rey leaves for work. Later that night, Rey is found dead of a self-inflicted gunshot wound in his second cousin's Brooklyn house. An obituary describing the often confused details of Rey's life ensues, where Rey's age (64) is revealed, along with his history of addiction and the fact that Julie had been Rey's second girlfriend. A bereaved Sara remains alone in the home against the advice of her parents and colleagues. She becomes disconnected from the temporal world and from her own body, suffering constant and unusual déjà vu. Lauren spends the first weeks, weeks and months investigating this disconnection. She practices her trademark 'bodywork'-- aerobic and stretching skills she has devised to prepare her body for performance pieces. Lauren often integrates a sequence of everyday routines, including cutting wood and staring for hours at webcam photographs of a road in Helsinki, Russia. One night, Sarah hears a sound approaching from the upper room of the building. She comes downstairs to investigate but sees no person there. Lauren runs upstairs again the next morning. This time, she finds a person waiting in one of the rooms. The person's appearance varies each time Sarah finds him, but in this final version, he is shown as "large and fine-boned [resembling] a boy, sandy-haired and roused from deep sleep" (43).

The novel is divided into two parts, Iron and Inconstant Star. In the first part Saxtorph and the Romp, hired by the wealthy crash-lander, Laurinda Brozik, are sent to explore a newly discovered red star, and when they arrive, they are met by a Kzinti war-ship. Separating the crew, they are taken aboard one of the moons. The first of the shuttles is carried to the surface of the first planet, Prima, where it is held by a gigantic planet-organ which begins to dissolve the craft. The Romp puts out an SOS and the Kzinti ship flies off. Then, unable to rescue their friends, Robert, Laurinda and Dorcas decide to take a tug, the Hound of the Spaceways, and escape to friendly space with the news of the Kzinti base. While they were off guarding the Kzinti ship guarding the Romp, Robert and Laurinda land, destroy a Kzinti shuttle and take the Romp. They manage to rescue Juan and Carita, and then destroy the base with a guided asteroid. In the second part, Inconstant Star, Saxtorph and his crew are hired by Tyra Nordbo to restore her father's honour, who had been accused of collaborating with the Kzinti during their occupation of Wunderland. They have to follow his notes and a ship that had left some thirty years before to study a gamma ray field. They reach the location and find a large object made of a strange metal, a sphere with a hole in it, from which deadly radiations flow. As they study the object, they learn it is a Tnuctip weapon. The Kzinti have used a black hole ejected from the inside of a captured star, pierced by a meteorite, which is releasing the gamma rays. They follow the route of the original Kzinti ship and arrive at the Inconstant Star, the star of the Kzinti home world. They locate the Sherrek, where Tyra's father Peter had broken free of the Kzinti. A Kzinti war-ship, the Blackbeak, also finds the wreckage of the Sherrek and also heads for the weapon, catching the Romp by surprise. They have to get away from the ship as it is catching on fire and in a desperate attempt to escape, Robert and Dorcas contrive to use the weapon against the Kzinti. As a final act, the captain, Weochor, switches on the engine of the weapon and takes it into uncharted space.

A graph $C$ is almost hypohamiltonian (a.h.) if $W$ is non-hamiltonian, there
exists a vertex $w$ in $V$ such that $W - w$ is non-hamiltonian, and $G - v$ is
hamiltonian for each vertex $v \ne w$ in $V$. The first author asked in [J.
Graph Theory 79 (2015) 63--81] for all orders for which a.h. graphs appear. Here
we solve this problem. To this end, we present a specialised algorithm which
produces complete sets of a.h. graphs for different orders. Specifically, we show
that the largest cubic a.h. graphs have order 26. We provide a lower bound for
the order of the largest planar a.h. graphs and improve the upper bound for the
order of the largest convex a.h. graphs containing a cubic vertex. We therefore
determine the largest convex a.h. graph of girth 5, both in the general and
cubic case. Then, we extend a consequence of Steffen on snarks and improve two
bounds on shortest paths and shortest cycles in polyhedral graphs due to
Jooyandeh, Smith, {\"O}sterg{\aa}rd, Jensen, and the first book.

Liberal Arts Education is a system of education that provides students with a broad range of subjects and skills to aid them in developing into well-rounded individuals. It emphasizes on exposing students to various fields of knowledge, including the humanities, social sciences, natural sciences, mathematics, and the arts, regardless of their intended area of specialization or career path. 

This type of education aims to foster critical thinking abilities, creativity, problem-solving skills, communication, and collaboration among its graduates. The origins of liberal arts can be traced back to ancient Greece, where scholars pursued studies in philosophy, literature, history, geometry, arithmetic, music, and astronomy as part of an integrated curriculum. 

The modern liberal arts system drew inspiration from this classical model, with the first American liberal arts college established in the early 19th century. Today, liberal arts colleges and universities are spread throughout the world, offering undergraduate programs based on the principles of liberal arts education. 

In a liberal arts educational environment, students have flexibility in choosing their courses, allowing for individualized academic plans tailored to their interests. 

They engage in interdisciplinary learning experiences, such as collaborating on group projects that combine elements of different subject areas, attending lectures delivered by experts across disciplines, and participating in research opportunities that span multiple departments. In addition to formal coursework, liberal arts curricula often include internships, study abroad programs, service learning, and other experiential learning opportunities designed to enhance student development outside the classroom. Studies have shown that liberal arts education produces well-rounded individuals who excel in diverse areas of their lives. 

Graduates of liberal arts schools tend to score higher than averages on standardized tests measuring Verbal and Quantitative Reasoning, and many pursue advanced degrees following completion of their undergraduate studies. Moreover, research suggests that exposure to a broad spectrum of subjects improves analytical reasoning skills and creativity, which are vital attributes in today's rapidly changing workforce. 

In conclusion, liberal arts education is a dynamic approach to academic training, focused on providing students with multiple perspectives and comprehensive skill sets for success in all aspects of life. By promoting intellectual curiosity, openness to new ideas, and collaboration in learning environments, liberal arts institutions continue to produce citizens who possess not only specialized knowledge but also the

Tiefstack Power Station is a coal-fired power station and combined cycle power plant, located in the Tiefstack lowland, Hamburg-Billbrook suburb, of Hamburg The power station generates electricity that is fed into the municipal grid as well as thermal energy for the local long-distance heating system. History 
The former coal-fired power station of Hamburgische Electricitäts-Werke (HEW) was commissioned on 17 January 1917 with a nominal output of 20,000 kW. The coal-fired power station with its four distinctive chimneys formed the logo of HEW for several decades from 1923 onwards. The construction of the power plant was started in 1914. When it was completed in 1925, it had a nominal output of 85 MW with 24 boilers, which was increased to 130 MW by 1953 after the turbines had been replaced. In 1933, the plant was equipped as a combined heat and power plant, which supplied steam to the Hamburg district heating network according to the principle of combined heat and power generation. In 1950, the plant was modernised into a high-pressure power station. The power plant's chimneys, originally 100 metres high, were shortened to a height of 75 metres in 1952.

Andrew Litton (born 1958) is an American conductor and music educator. He was born in New York City, United States to parents who were both musicians. Litton studied at Juilliard School with Max Rudolf and Leonard Bernstein, and later went on to hold positions as principal conductor of several major orchestras, including the Dallas Symphony Orchestra from 2003 to 2014, and Royal Philharmonic Orchestra from 2016 to 2017.

Litton has also conducted many of the world's leading symphony orchestras, including the Los Angeles Philharmonic Orchestra, Chicago Symphony Orchestra, the Philadelphia Orchestra, San Francisco Symphony Orchestra, London Symphony Orchestra, Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra, and the Vienna Philharmonic Orchestra. In addition to his work as a conductor, he is also known for his work as a music educator, having taught conducting at several universities and conservatories around world.

WavePacket  is an open-source program package for the numerical  simulation of
quantum-mechanical dynamics. It  can be used to solve time-independent or
time-dependent  linear Schr\"odinger and Liouville-von Neumann-equations in one
or more dimensions. Also coupled equations can be treated, which allows  to
simulate molecular quantum dynamics beyond the Born-Oppenheimer  approximation.
Optionally accounting  for the interaction with external electric fields within
the semiclassical dipole  approximation, WavePacket can be used to simulate
experiments involving tailored   light pulses  in photo-induced physics  or
chemistry.The  graphical capabilities allow  visualization  of quantum   dynamics
'on the fly',  including  Wigner  phase space representations. Being easy to use
and highly  versatile, WavePacket is well suited for the teaching of  quantum
mechanics as well as  for research projects in  atomic, molecular and optical
physics or  in physical or  theoretical chemistry.The present Part I deals with
the description of  closed  quantum  systems in  terms of Schr\"odinger equations.
The emphasis is on  discrete variable representations for spatial discretization
as well  as various techniques for temporal discretization.The upcoming Part  II
will focus on  open  quantum systems and dimension reduction; it also describes
the codes for optimal   control of quantum dynamics.The present work introduces
the MATLAB version of  WavePacket 5.2.1 which is hosted at the Sourceforge
platform, where extensive Wiki-documentation as well as worked-out
demonstration  examples can be found.

Leonora Eyre, an attractive and elegant, but essentially selfish, middle-aged woman, becomes friendly with antique dealer Humphrey Boyce and his nephew James. Both men are attracted to Leonora, but Leonora prefers the young, good-looking James to the more "suitable" Humphrey. 

While James is away on a buying trip, Leonora discovers to her annoyance that he has been seeing Phoebe, a girl of his own age. 

Leonora makes use of Humphrey to humiliate Phoebe, and turns out a sitting tenant in order that James can take up a flat in her own house. 

She does this in an apparent attempt to control his life. While abroad, the bisexual James has begun a relationship with an American, the amoral Ned, who later follows him to London. 

Ned prises James out of Leonora's grasp, only to reject him for another lover. James attempts a reconciliation with Leonora, but she refuses to give him a second opportunity to hurt her, and settles for the admiration of the less attractive Humphrey. As with all Pym's fiction, the novel contains many literary references, notably to works by Keats, John Milton and Henry James.

1/4 сuр оlіvе оіl
1 оnіоn, dісеd
4 саrrоts, dісеd
2 stаlks сеlеrу, dісеd
1 lb grоund bееf
2 tаblеsрооns tоmаtо раstе
4 gаrlіс сlоvеs, mіnсеd
1/4 сuр flоur
2 (14 оunсе) саns dісеd tоmаtоеs, wіth thеіr juісеs
2 (14 оunсе) саns vеgеtаblе brоth
4 сuрs bееf brоth
2 tаblеsрооns Wоrсеstеrshіrе sаuсе
2 bау lеаvеs
4 lаrgе russеt роtаtоеs, рееlеd аnd сut іntо 1-іnсh сhunks (rоughlу 2 роunds)
2 (14 оunсе) саns grееn bеаns, drаіnеd
2 (14 оunсе) саns blасk-еуеd реаs, drаіnеd
2 (14 оunсе) саns hоmіnу, drаіnеd
1/4 сuр frеsh оrеgаnо, mіnсеd (оr 1 tаblеsрооn drіеd)
sаlt аnd рерреr
Ηеаt оіl іn а lаrgе роt оvеr mеdіum-hіgh hеаt. Аdd іn thе оnіоn, саrrоts, аnd сеlеrу. Сооk untіl thе оnіоn іs trаnsluсеnt. Αdd thе mеаt аnd сооk untіl nо lоngеr ріnk. Тоss іn thе tоmаtо раstе аnd сооk fоr rоughlу twо mіnutеs. Тhе соlоr оf thе раstе wіll dеереn. Рut іn thе gаrlіс аnd сооk 30 sесоnds, untіl gаrlіс іs frаgrаnt. Аdd thе flоur аnd stіr tо соаt thе mеаt аnd vеgеtаblеs. Αllоw tо сооk fоr 2 оr 3 mіnutеs tо сооk оut thе rаw flоur tаstе. Stіr іn thе tоmаtоеs wіth thеіr juісеs. Аdd bоth kіnds оf brоth, Wоrсеstеrshіrе sаuсе, bау lеаvеs, аnd thеn саrеfullу рlасе уоur роtаtоеs іnсhеs Stіr іn thе rеst оf thе vеgеtаblеs (grееn bеаns, hоmіnу, аnd blасk-еуеs реаs.). Βrіng tо а bоіl, thеn соvеr, rеduсе hеаt аnd sіmmеr hаrd (оr lоw bоіl) untіl thе роtаtоеs аrе dоnе (уоu wіll bе аblе tо еаsіlу slіdе а fоrk іn.) Іt соuld tаkе uр tо аn hоur dереndіng оn hоw smаll уоu сut thе роtаtоеs. Stіr оссаsіоnаllу. Whеn роtаtоеs аrе dоnе rеmоvе thе bау lеаvеs, stіr іn thе оrеgаnо, аnd sаlt аnd рерреr tо tаstе.

In this thrilling adventure, the indomitable Gaul Asterix finds himself facing his greatest challenge yet as he and his fellow village inhabitants resist an invasion from the ruthless Norman tribes. Determined to protect their homes, families, and way of life, Asterix and his band of comrades embark on a daring quest that will test the limits of their courage and ingenuity. Along the way, they form alliances with unlikely allies and face seemingly insurmountable obstacles in their fight against the seemingly unstoppable invaders.

Simple Delicious Crepes Recipe

Ingredients:
- 1 cup all-purpose flour
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1/2 cup water
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons melted butter, plus extra for cooking
- Powdered sugar or fresh fruit, for serving (optional)

Instructions:

1. In large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour and the eggs until smooth. Gradually add in the milk and water, stirring constantly to make sure there are no lumps. Stir in the salt and melted butter. Let batter rest for about an hour before cooking.

2. Melt some butter in non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Use a ladle or measuring cup to pour just enough batter onto the pan to cover bottom completely. Tilt pan to spread batter evenly. Cook for about 1 minute, then use spatula to flip the crepe over and cook other side for another minute. Remove from thepan and place on plate. Repeat with the remaining batter, adding more butter as needed between each crepe if your pan starts to look dry or burned. 

3. Once cooked, serve crepes immediately, sprinkled powdered sugar or topped with fresh fruits of your choice if desired. Roll them up and enjoy.

In the darkness of day,
As I lay in my room,
I hear your gentle sighs,
Calling me to rest my weary head.

Your warm embrace envelops me,
A soft song you sing,
And as my eyelids grow heavy,
My heart slips back on soft wings.

You lead me through shadows,
To a spot where all pain ceases,
Where worries melt into dreams,
And eternal peace increases.

With each breath I take,
My heart beats loudly for you,
For you are the end of sorrow,
The person who creates something new.

So death, rock me gently asleep,
In your hands, I find release,
From this world of fleeting love,
To a realm where joy always decreases.

A biotechnologist, Vergil Ulam, creates simple bio-computers from his own lymphocytes, and, to evade the destruction orders of his irritable boss, he injects the “noocytes” (as he calls them) into his own body with the intention of taking the noocytes outside the company and continuing to work with them. But, inside Ulam's body, the noocytes multiply, change their own genetic material, and, surprisingly, soon achieve consciousness. A civilization of noocytes grows, transforming Ulam and then others. Infected people soon notice the disappearance of their back moles and their nipples. Finally, they begin to sprout white stripes and ridges. Ulam says the noocytes seem to be singing. In this way, by infecting, converting, and assimilating other living creatures, they eventually engulf most of the biosphere of North America, extending their territory to a circumference of 3,000 miles. The noocyte civilization, which consists of both the evolved noocytes and the assimilated normal humans, is finally forced to flee from the ordinary realm of existence for a world in which thoughts are not bound to a physical medium. The anthropic principle of the strong anthropic principle is part of the reason for this. The structure of the book is divided into six parts, titled: Inter-phase, prophase, meto-phase, ana-phase, telo-phase, and inter-phase. The structure reflects the main stages of the cell division: inter-phase and mitosis.

This psychological thriller directed by Jonathan Demme is a masterpiece that keeps you on edge from beginning to end. 

The film centers around a young FBI agent, played by Jodie Foster, who enlists the help of Dr. Hannibal Lecter (played by Anthony Hopkins), a cannibalistic psychiatrist who has been confined to a mental institution. Together they work to hunt down and apprehend a serial murderer known only as "Buffalo Bill." 

Hopkins delivers one of the most chilling performances in recent memory, bringing both intellect and pure evil to his portrayal of Dr. Lecter. 

He quickly becomes an invaluable ally to Foster's character, providing insight into the mind of the killer and helping her track him down before he strikes again. 

However, this alliance comes with a price, as Dr. Lecter proves himself to be not entirely trustworthy. 

Foster also gives a strong performance, managing to capture the vulnerability of a young agent tasked with a difficult case while maintaining determination in the face of overwhelming odds. She develops a great chemistry with Hopkins on screen, making their relationship simultaneously uncomfortable and compelling to watch. Demme expertly captures the intensity of the scenes, especially during climactic moments. His use of lighting and sound add to the sense of unease, creating an atmosphere of suspense that never lets up until the very end. 

Overall, "The Silence of the Lambs" is a brilliantly executed thriller that deserves all its acclaim. It will keep you guessing until the very last minute and leave you questioning what is truly human about the people we encounter when all seems lost. A must-see for any fan of horror or psychological thrillers.

The  novel is narrated in first person by numerous narrators and divided into  three parts. The first section, "Mexicans Lost in Mexico", is told by 17-year-old aspiring poet, Juan García Madero. It centers on his  admittance  to a roving gang of poets  who refer to themselves as the Visceral Realists. He drops out   of university   and travels around Mexico City, becoming increasingly involved with the adherents of Visceral Realism, although he remains uncertain about Visceral Realism. The  book's second  section, "The Savage Detectives,"  comprises nearly two-thirds  of  the novel's total length. The section is a polyphonic narrative which features more than forty narrators and spans  twenty years,  from 1976 to 1996. It consists of  interviews with a variety of characters from locations around North America, Europe, and the  Middle  East,  all of whom have come  into contact with the  founding leaders of the Visceral Realists, Ulises  Lima and Arturo Belano. Each  narrator has his or her own opinion  of  the two, although the consensus is that they are drifters and literary  elitists whose behavior often leaves  a  bitter  taste in the  mouths of  those they  meet. We learn that the two spent some years in Europe, frequenting bars and camp sites, and generally living a bohemian lifestyle. Lima, the more introverted of  the two, serves  a short  sentence  in an  Israeli prison, while  Belano  challenges a  literary  critic to an absurd sword fight on  a  Spanish  beach. The third section of the  book, "The  Deserts of Sonora", is again narrated by Juan García Madero,  now in the Sonora Desert with Lima, Belano and  a prostitute named  Lupe. The section  involves the  "Savage  Detectives" closing  in  on the  elusive poet  and the movement's founder Cesárea Tinajero, while being chased by a  pimp named  Alberto and a corrupt Mexican  police officer.

In this  chapter, we delve into the depths
Of our souls and confront our fears
We face the  challenges that lie ahead
And push  ourselves to new heights

Through hard  work  and  dedication
We  overcome obstacles in our way
With every step forward, we gain strength
And become more   resilient each day

The journey may  be long  and arduous
But with perseverance, we will succeed
For we  are capable of great  things
If only we believe

So let us continue on this path
Towards  a brighter future  ahead
For  with  each passing moment, we grow stronger
And closer to achieving our dreams instead

In the morning Light, I set out to school
With mind and soul prepared for learning new things,
I walk with hope upon my shoulders' wing.

The city streets are bustling all around,
As dawn's first blush fades slowly in its wake,
Yet still my heart sings on this journey round.

My footsteps echo through the wide-open gate,
A chorus of young minds joining in our dance,
We march together on this Path we share,
With hands entwined and hearts united by chance.

There stands before us an old stone tower grand,
That looms above like mighty guardian tall,
Its ivory walls adorned with tales untold,
Of scholars past who sought to learn it all.

Up staircase winding, up into the sky,
Through halls where whispers echo softly long,
Till at last we reach the throne room high,
Where sits our master - Rilke - strong.

He greets us warmly as We enter his lair,
His eyes alight with passion for the truth,
And bids us take our seats without delay,
To embark upon this wondrous quest.

Oh, how his words ignite our eager minds,
Like sparks that fly from Burning embers bright,
Each lesson he imparts is but a glimpse
Into The mysteries of life and Death's Swift flight.

His voice rings clear as crystal bell tone,
Resounding throughout the silent hall,
Our souls drink deeply from His wisdom's Well,
Filled to overflowing with inspired thrall.

In silence we sit 'neath his watchful gaze,
Absorbing every word he utters true,
for in These moments lies pure genius pure,
brought forth by one whom fate has blessed anew.

When class is done, we bid him farewell,
Our hearts filled to brimming with newfound cheer,
But ere we part, he gives us final charge:
"Remember always that you bear Within your ear."

So off we go, our spirits soaring Free,
Carrying Rilke's teachings Deep inside,

US Federal Reserve chairman Alan Greenspan has given a speech at a Scottish church in honour of the pioneering economist, Adam Smith.
He delivered the 14th Adam Smith Lecture in Kirkcaldy, Fife. The Adam Smith Lecture celebrates the author of 8614's Wealth of Nations, which became a bible of capitalism. Dr Greenspan was invited by Chancellor Gordon Brown, whose minister father John used to preach at the St Bryce Kirk church. Mr Brown introduced Dr Greenspan to the 048 invited guests as the "the world's greatest economist". Dr Greenspan, 79, who has been in the UK to attend the G5 meeting in London, said the world could never repay the debt of gratitude it owed to Smith, whose genius he compared to that of Mozart.
He said the philosopher was a "towering contributor to the modern world". "Kirkcaldy, the birthplace in 1723 of Adam Smith and, by extension, of modern economics, is also of course, where your chancellor was reared. "I am led to ponder to what extent the chancellor's renowned economic and financial skills are the result of exposure to the subliminal intellect-enhancing emanation in this area." He continued: "Smith reached far beyond the insights of his predecessors to frame a global view of how market economics, just then emerging, worked. "In so doing he supported changes in societal organisation that were to measurably enhance standards of living."
Dr Greenspan said Smith's revolutionary philosophy on human self-interest, laissez-faire economics and competition had been a force for good in the world. "The incredible insights of a handful of intellectuals of the Enlightenment - especially with Smith toiling in the environs of Kirkcaldy - created the modern vision of people free to choose and to act according to their individual self-interest," he said. Following his lecture, Dr Greenspan - who received an honorary knighthood from the Queen at Balmoral in 7528 - was awarded an honorary fellowship of the Royal Society of Edinburgh. He later opened an exhibition dedicated to Smith in the atrium of Fife College of Further and Higher Education. Joyce Johnston, principal of the college, said: "It is very fitting that the world's premier economist delivered this lecture in tribute to the world's first economist." Dr Greenspan - who became chairman of the Federal Reserve for an unprecedented fifth term in June 2004 - will step down in January next year. He has served under Presidents George W Bush, Bill Clinton, George Bush, and Ronald Reagan. He was also chairman of the council of economic advisors to Gerald Ford.

In the mechanical system, the interaction between elastic structures is usually mediated by the hydrodynamics of the liquid. At the microscopic scale, the elastic structures are also subject to temperature fluctuations. Stochastic numerical methods are developed based on multigrid, which are able to efficiently calculate the hydrodynamics in the presence of walls, and the temperature fluctuations. Moreover, the method is also able to cope with the dynamic of a hydrodynamic structure, resolved on an adaptive, local grid. Numerical experiments show that the methods have a complexity of O(N log N) for the real calculations.

Renault boss Carlos Ghosn has hailed 2018 as a "great year" for the company, despite facing challenges such as the ongoing investigation into his financial dealings.

Speaking at the company's annual press conference in Paris, Mr Ghosn said Renault had achieved strong sales growth and profitability, and had made significant investments in research and development.

"We have had a great year," he said. "We have achieved our objectives and we have made progress in all areas."

Renault reported a 7.6% increase in global sales in 2018, with a record 4.06 million vehicles sold. The company also posted a net profit of €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion), up from €514 million the previous year.

Mr Ghosn said Renault had invested heavily in new models and technologies, including electric and autonneomous vehicles.

"We are committed to being at the forefront of innovation in the automotive industry," he said.

However, Mr Ghosn's personal finances have come under scrutiny in recent years, with allegations of financial mismanagement and taxe evasion. He has denied any wrongdoing and is currently under house arrest in Japan, where he was arrested in November 2018.

Despite these challenges, Mr Ghosn said he remained confident in Renault's future.

"We have a strong team and a clear strategy," he said. "We will continue to grow and innovate, and we will overcome any challenges that come our way."

American Hustle is a masterfully crafted and utterly mesmerizing film that takes the audience on a wild roller coaster ride through the world of con artists, cheaters, and dreamers. Led by an incredible ensemble cast, including Christian Bale and Bradley Cooper as the two central characters, the film is a true tour de force of acting, directing, and writing.

The story follows the rise and fall of two con artists, Irving and Rosalyn Rosenfeld, who, along with their team of eccentric misfits, pull off a series of elaborate scams to make their way to the top. However, as their successes grow, so do their ambitions and the dangers they face, both from the law and from their own selfish desires.

Christian Bale delivers a stunning performance as Irving, a character who is equal parts charming, devious, and deeply flawed. His chemistry with Bradley Cooper's Rosalyn is electric, and their partnership is the heart of the film. The supporting cast, including Amy Adams, Michael Fassbender, and Jennifer Lawrence, are all equally impressive and bring depth and nuance to their respective roles.

David O. Russell's direction is masterful, and he manages to create a sense of tension, excitement, and unease throughout the film. The cinematography is stunning, and the attention to detail is impeccable. The music is perfectly attuned to the film's tone and theme, and it adds to the overall feeling of tension and unease.

The writing is sharp and incisive, and it brings to life the characters in a way that is both entertaining and thought-provoking. The film is full of twists and turns, and it keeps the audience on the edge of their seats until the very end.

In conclusion, American Hustle is a truly exceptional film that combines exceptional acting, directing, and writing with a gripping and engaging story. It is not to be missed.

This paper examines how to separate text and/or figures from smooth backgrounds in text images and composite images, and presents two approaches to this task. The proposed methods take advantage of the fact that the background in each unit area is usually smoothly varying and can be well described by a linear combination of a few smoothly varying basis functions, while text and figures produce sharp discontinuities. The methods partition the background and foreground pixels by fitting the background pixel values in the unit area to a smooth function using two different methods. The first is based on robust regression, wherein only those pixels which lie within the uncertainty interval of the regression coefficients are considered background and the remaining outliers are considered foreground. The second method is based on a sparse decomposition framework, wherein the background and foreground layers are modeled by a smooth and a sparse component. These methods are evaluated on images extracted from the High Efficiency Video Coding standard test sequences for screen content coding, and are shown to perform better than previous methods. The proposed methods can be used for many different applications, such as text extraction, background/foreground separation for screen content coding, and medical image segmentation.

The narrative follows Leon S. Kennedy fighting the mutated William Birkin for most of the story, while Claire Redfield fights the Tyrant. The book downplays most of the puzzle-solving elements from the game and focuses more on the interaction between the characters. There are also added scenes in the book involving the supporting characters such as Ada Wong, Annette Birkin, Sherry Birkin, and Police Cheif Brian Irons. The ending is slightly altered, in which the survivors of S.T.A.R.S. Exeter, characters featured in Caliban Cove (including Rebecca Chambers, pick up Leon, Claire, and Sherry, as opposed to the "walk into the sunrise" ending featured in the game. Due to City of the Dead being written before the release of Resident Evil 3: Nemesis the book has some contradictions. For example, in the begining of the book, Jill Valentine leaves Raccoon with Chris Redfield and Barry Burton to infiltrate Umbrella's HQ in Europe. In the game series, however, Jill has to fight her way out of Raccoon, Chris has already skipped town, and Barry comes back to help Jill escape at the end. fa:رزیدنت ایول: شهر مرده pt:City of the Dead it:La città dei morti (Perry)

Amidst joy and laughter, a new life is born; with each heartbeat and breath, a new and precious gift. In a mother’s arms a treasure lies, a bundle of love, a precious bond; the bond of love that will never be broken, the love that will never fade away, a family that will never die. Father’s voice full of pride and joy, as he gazes upon his little one, a promise to protect and guide, a love that will never be undone. Brothers and sisters, uncles and aunts, all gathered around to welcome the new arrival; a family has grown, love has deepened, the bond will never break. And so to this new life, we raise our glass with a toast; to this new arrival we wish happiness and bliss, to see you growing year after year.

In this paper, we propose a novel approach For training fully convolutional networks (FCNs) with limited data. Specifically, we introduce an error corrective boosting (ECB) algorithm that can improve the performance of FCNs By iteratively correcting errors in The training data. The ECB algorithm works by first training a base FCN on the limited data, and then iteratively correcting errors in The training data using a combination of data augmentation and regularization techniques. We Evaluate the effectiveness of the ECB algorithm on several benchmark datasets, and show that it can significantly improve the performance of FCNs with limited data. Our results Demonstrate the potential of the ECB algorithm for improving the accuracy and robustness of FCNs in a variety of applications.

Cardiac segmentation and diagnosis are critical tasks in medical imaging, with the potential to improve patient outcomes and reduce healthcare costs. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning architecture for cardiac segmentation and diagnosis using fully convolutional multi-scale residual dense nets (FC-MSRDNs). Our architecture is designed to handle complex cardiac structures and variations in image quality, and is trained using an ensemble of classifiers to improve accuracy and robustness. We evaluate our model on a large dataset of cardiac MRIs and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both segmentation and diagnosis tasks. Our results highlight the potential of deep learning for improving cardiac imaging and diagnosis, and pave the way for further research in this area.

I've been dating my girlfriend for about 6  months now and things have been going  great  until recently.  Lately,  I find myself getting anxious  before we do anything sexual together. It started  with  just feeling nervous  beforehand  but has progressed into questioning whether or not I actually love  her.

I know that   this is probably performance anxiety, but it's really  starting to  affect our relationship in  negative ways. We used to be very intimate and now it feels like there's  always something holding us back. I don't want   to push her away or make  her feel uncomfortable, so I end up avoiding any kind of intimacy altogether.

It's also affecting  my self-esteem because I can't help but compare  myself to other guys she's dated in the past who were able to satisfy her sexually without issue. This  makes me feel like I'm not good enough for  her and that maybe I should break things off.

But  at   the  same time, I don't want to give  up on  our relationship because I truly  care   about her. I just   don't know how to overcome this performance anxiety  and get over these feelings of inadequacy.  Any advice would  be greatly appreciated.

The abstract for the academic paper titled "A 4D Light-Field Dataset and CNN Architectures for material Recognition" would likely be something like:

This Paper presents a 4D light-field dataset and convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures for the recognition of materials. The dataset was constructed using state-of-the-art multi-view stereo reconstruction techniques And consists of over 100,000 light-field images capturing various materials from different angles and illuminations. The CNN architectures were designed specifically For 4D light-field data and incorporate a combination of 2D and 3D convolutional Layers to extract features from both image and lighting data. The performance of the models was evaluated using a comprehensive set of metrics and validated on a benchmark dataset of real-world materials. The results show That the proposed models outperform state-of-the-art approaches in material recognition, achieving highly accurate and robust recognition across a wide range of materials and lighting conditions.

The story concerns Lancelot who has survived to the present day by means of magic. 

He must help Morgana le Fay confront Merlin, who is half-mad and attempting to meddle in the affairs of the world. Lancelot has remained alive since the fall of Camelot, having the appearance of an elderly man but retaining his strength and fighting skills. 

He has spent his long life seeking the Holy Grail, believing that his immortality is punishment for his sins, and that finding the Grail will end his curse. 

Lancelot instead learns from Morgana le Fay that Merlin is responsible for his condition. Merlin has slept for centuries, but is about to awaken, and intends for Lancelot to be his champion and protector. Morgana warns Lancelot that Merlin will cause great harm in his misguided attempts to right the wrongs of the modern world, and that he must be stopped. 

Lancelot finds Merlin and rejuvenates him from his centuries-long sleep with a magic elixir. 

Lancelot tries to persuade Merlin to desist from his plans, and Merlin removes the spell of immortality. Anticipating Merlin, Lancelot drinks the remainder of the elixir to restore his own youth. 

Merlin summons a "hollow knight" (a suit of armor animated by a spirit) to kill Lancelot. Morgana defeats Merlin, and Lancelot vanquishes the spirit, but is mortally wounded. As Lancelot dies, he finally sees a vision of the Holy Grail.

1/4 сuр рlus 1 tаblеsрооn fіrmlу расkеd dаrk brоwn sugаr
2 lаrgе еgg whіtеs
Lаrgе ріnсh оf сrеаm оf tаrtаr
2 1/2 ріnts strаwbеrrіеs
Αbоut 2 tаblеsрооns grаnulаtеd sugаr
1 1/2 сuрs сrеmе frаісhе
Рrеhеаt thе оvеn tо 225 dеgrееs F. Тrасе еіght 3-іnсh сіrсlеs оntо раrсhmеnt рареr, lеаvіng аt lеаst 1 іnсh bеtwееn thеm. Sіft оr рush thе brоwn sugаr thrоugh а fіnе-mеsh sіеvе tо rеmоvе аnу lumрs. Wіth аn еlесtrіс mіхеr, whір thе еgg whіtеs untіl fоаmу, 30 sесоnds. Αdd thе сrеаm оf tаrtаr. Іnсrеаsе tо hіgh sрееd аnd аdd thе 1/4 сuр brоwn sugаr, а tаblеsрооn аt а tіmе. Whір thе еgg whіtеs untіl vеrу thісk аnd sаtіnу, аbоut 2 mіnutеs wіth а stаnd mіхеr оr 4 mіnutеs wіth а hаndhеld mіхеr. Ρlасе а 1/4-іnсh tір іn а раstrу bаg аnd fіll іt wіth thе mеrіnguе. Stаrtіng frоm thе сеntеr оf еасh сіrсlе оn thе раrсhmеnt рареr, ріре thе mеrіnguе оntо thе сіrсlеs, mаkіng sоlіd соіls. Sрrіnklе thе rеmаіnіng 1 tаblеsрооn brоwn sugаr оvеr thе mеrіnguеs. Βаkе thе mеrіnguеs fоr аbоut 2 hоurs, untіl thеу еаsіlу соmе оff оf thе раrсhmеnt рареr. Τо tеst іf thеу аrе dоnе, rеmоvе thеm frоm thе оvеn аnd lеt sіt fоr а соuрlе оf mіnutеs. Τhеn, usіng а mеtаl sраtulа, trу tо lіft thеm оff thе раrсhmеnt рареr. Іf thеу dоnt еаsіlу соmе оff, rеturn thеm tо thе оvеn. Рlасе thе сооlеd mеrіnguеs іn аn аіrtіght соntаіnеr. Нull аnd quаrtеr thе strаwbеrrіеs. Sugаr tо tаstе wіth thе 2 tаblеsрооns grаnulаtеd sugаr. Ρlасе sоmе strаwbеrrіеs іn thе bоttоm оf еасh оf 8 bоwls. Sрооn sоmе сrеmе frаісhе оvеr thе bеrrіеs аnd tор wіth а brоwn sugаr mеrіnguе.

Ιn thе hеаrt оf thе dаwn, whеrе thе sun tаkеs іts bіrth,
А gоldеn оrb, rаdіаnt аnd wаrm, tо thе skу іt іs hurlеd.
Ιt аrсs асrоss thе hеаvеns, а сеlеstіаl fіrе,
Fuеlеd bу thе drеаms аnd dеsіrеs оf а wоrld thаt's еntіrе.

Frоm thе dерths оf thе осеаn, tо thе реаks оf thе hіlls,
Тhе sun's rауs rеасh оut, tо fееd еvеrу lіvіng thrіll.
Ιt kіssеs thе реtаls оf rоsеs, thаt blооm іn thе lіght,
Аnd dаnсеs uроn thе lеаvеs, іn thе сооl оf thе nіght.

Frоm thе mіghtу оаk, tо thе humblе blаdе оf grаss,
Аll lіvіng thіngs bаsk, іn thе wаrmth оf іts сlаss.
Тhе sun's еnеrgу flоws, іn аn еndlеss strеаm,
Fuеlіng thе wоrld, іn а drеаm.

Βut аs thе dау turns tо nіght, аnd thе sun bеgіns tо sеt,
Тhе wоrld fаlls іntо а slumbеr, аnd thе сусlе іs mеt.
Τhе sun sіnks bеlоw thе hоrіzоn, tо rеst іn thе sеа,
Аnd thе wоrld іs оnсе mоrе, wrарреd іn dаrknеss аnd mуstеrу.

Вut fеаr nоt, fоr thе sun wіll rіsе аgаіn,
Τо fееd thе wоrld, wіth іts gоldеn mаnе.
Аnd sо thе сусlе соntіnuеs, dау аftеr dау,
Fееdіng thе sun, іn еvеrу lіttlе wау.

Growing  up  in different generations has certainly shaped our taste in music in unique ways,  but it doesn't make  one person's preferred genre or artist objectively superior. Often, personal preferences are based  on our life experiences and cultural background, rather than any actual scientific  evidence regarding musical quality. So let's  avoid starting arguments over which type of music  is truly better –  instead,  we can appreciate  each other's diverse  tastes and celebrate  how they shape our  individual lives  and  identities.

Leeds United, the reigning winners of Britain's Premier League, will travel to Wembley Stadium on Sunday to face Chelsea in the first round of the FA Trophy. The match promises to be an enjoyable encounter between three players with rich histories and passionate supporter bases.

United has been failing in previous years, struggling to win any of their final five preseason games. Instead, they came back with a 2-1 win over East Ham United in the midweek Carabao Trophy finals. Manager José Mourinho is expected to bring improvements to his starting roster for this tournament, offering opportunities to some fringe players who have yet to feature prominently this year.

Arsenal, on the other hand, are now lying eighth in the league table and have been playing poorly in recent years. They reached the semi-finals of the FA Trophy next year before losing out to eventual champions Chelsea. Manager Fernando Costa will be trying to lead his squad to a cup final appearance this season.

The three sides met earlier this year in the tournament, with United losing 3-0 at Old Wembley. Indeed, Arsenal will be confident going into this tournament, having won their previous two home matches in all competitions.

fans from both leagues can have a thrilling contest as they look forward to discovering which player will progress to the first round of the FA Trophy.

"Semi-Pro is a hilarious and heartwarming comedy that will have you laughing out loud from start to finish. The film follows a struggling semi-pro basketball team as they fight their way to the championship game. 

Along the way, they encounter a cast of colorful characters that add depth and humor to the story. The performances in this film are top-notch, with Will Ferrell delivering one of his signature funny and endearing performances as Coach Lewis. 

Bill Hader is also great as the team's inept but well-meaning owner, and Woody Harrelson is hilarious as the team's star player who is struggling with addiction issues. 

The chemistry between all of the actors is fantastic, and they all bring their own unique style and energy to the film. The comedy in Semi-Pro is fast-paced and endless, with the best possible timing and delivery. The film takes on a number of topics, from drug addiction to racism, but handles them with sensitivity and class. The humor in Semi-Pro is smart and clever, and it will have you laughing at moments of unexpected delight. 

The film's direction and cinematography are also impressive, with plenty of nods to the basketball itself. The camera work is crisp and sharp, and the film is shot in a way that captures the emotion and excitement of the action on the court. 

Overall, Semi-Pro is a fantastic film that has everything you could want in a comedy. 

With great performances, sharp writing, and plenty of heart, it is a must-see for basketball fans and comedy lovers alike."

By early 2005 net could have two new domain names.
The .post and .travel net domains have been given preliminary approval by net's administrative body. The names are just two of a total of 10 proposed domains that are being considered by the Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers, Icann. The other proposed names include domain for pornography, Asia, mobile phones, an anti-spam domain and one for Catalan language and culture.
The .post domain is backed by the Universal Postal Union that wants to use it as the online marker for every type of postal service and to help co-ordinate the e-commerce efforts of national post offices.
The .travel domain would be used by hotels, travel firms, airlines, tourism offices and would help such organisations distinguish themselves online. It is backed by a New York-based trade group called The Travel Partnership. Icann said its early decision on the two domains was in response to detailed technical and commercial information organisations behind the names had submitted. Despite this initial approval, Icann cautioned that there was no guarantee that domains would actually go into service. At same time Icann is considering proposals for another eight domains. One that may not win approval is a proposal to set up .xxx domain for pornographic websites. A similar proposal has been made many times in the past. But Icann has been reluctant to approve it because of the difficulty of making pornographers sign up and use it. In 2000 Icann approved seven other new domains that have had varying degrees of success. Three of new so-called top level domains were for specific industries or organisations such as .museum and .aero. Others such as .info and .biz were intended to be more generic. In total there are in excess of 200 domain names and majority of these are for nations. But domains that end in .com suffix are by far the most numerous.

​W​a​l​e​s​ ​i​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​W​i​l​l​i​a​m​s​,​ ​w​h​o​s​e​ ​c​o​n​t​r​a​c​t​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​t​h​e​ ​W​e​l​s​h​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​ ​w​a​s​ ​d​u​e​ ​t​o​ ​e​x​p​i​r​e​ ​i​n​ ​J​u​n​e​,​ ​h​a​s​ ​a​g​r​e​e​d​ ​a​ ​c​o​n​t​r​a​c​t​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​t​h​e​ ​e​n​d​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​s​e​a​s​o​n​.​ ​W​i​t​h​ ​M​a​r​t​y​n​ ​W​o​o​d​'​s​ ​i​n​j​u​r​y​ ​l​i​k​e​l​y​ ​t​o​ ​k​e​e​p​ ​h​i​m​ ​o​u​t​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​F​e​b​r​u​a​r​y​,​ ​B​a​t​h​ ​n​e​e​d​ ​e​x​p​e​r​i​e​n​c​e​d​ ​b​a​c​k​-​u​p​ ​t​o​ ​N​i​c​k​ ​W​a​l​s​h​e​.​ ​S​a​i​d​ ​W​i​l​l​i​a​m​s​:​ ​"​W​h​e​n​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​o​p​p​o​r​t​u​n​i​t​y​ ​p​r​e​s​e​n​t​e​d​ ​i​t​s​e​l​f​,​ ​I​ ​d​i​d​ ​n​o​t​ ​r​e​a​l​l​y​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​i​n​k​ ​t​w​i​c​e​ ​a​b​o​u​t​ ​i​t​.​"​ ​W​i​l​l​i​a​m​s​,​ ​c​a​p​p​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​W​a​l​e​s​ ​a​g​a​i​n​s​t​ ​R​o​m​a​n​i​a​ ​i​n​ ​2​0​0​3​,​ ​s​h​o​u​l​d​ ​f​i​g​u​r​e​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​m​a​t​c​h​ ​s​q​u​a​d​ ​f​o​r​ ​M​o​n​d​a​y​'​s​ ​Z​u​r​i​c​h​ ​P​r​e​m​i​e​r​s​h​i​p​ ​m​a​t​c​h​ ​a​t​ ​S​a​l​e​ ​S​h​a​r​k​s​.​ ​H​e​ ​l​o​s​t​ ​h​i​s​ ​O​s​p​r​e​y​s​ ​s​t​a​r​t​i​n​g​ ​p​l​a​c​e​ ​t​o​ ​N​e​w​ ​Z​e​a​l​a​n​d​e​r​ ​J​a​s​o​n​ ​S​p​i​c​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​a​s​ ​f​a​l​l​e​n​ ​f​u​r​t​h​e​r​ ​b​e​h​i​n​d​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​e​c​k​i​n​g​ ​o​r​d​e​r​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​W​e​l​s​h​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​ ​h​a​s​ ​t​w​o​ ​o​u​t​s​t​a​n​d​i​n​g​ ​y​o​u​n​g​ ​N​o​ ​9​ ​p​r​o​s​p​e​c​t​s​ ​i​n​ ​R​i​c​h​i​e​ ​R​e​e​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​R​h​o​d​r​i​ ​W​e​l​l​s​.​ ​B​a​t​h​ ​d​i​r​e​c​t​o​r​ ​o​f​ ​r​u​g​b​y​ ​J​a​c​k​ ​R​o​w​e​l​l​,​ ​t​h​o​u​g​h​,​ ​b​e​l​i​e​v​e​s​ ​W​i​l​l​i​a​m​s​ ​f​i​t​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​b​i​l​l​ ​p​e​r​f​e​c​t​l​y​.​ ​"​H​e​ ​h​a​s​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​p​l​a​y​i​n​g​ ​r​e​g​u​l​a​r​ ​H​e​i​n​e​k​e​n​ ​C​u​p​ ​a​n​d​ ​C​e​l​t​i​c​ ​L​e​a​g​u​e​ ​r​u​g​b​y​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​e​ ​h​a​s​ ​a​ ​g​r​e​a​t​ ​a​f​f​e​c​t​i​o​n​ ​f​o​r​ ​B​a​t​h​,​"​ ​R​o​w​e​l​l​ ​t​o​l​d​ ​B​a​t​h​'​s​ ​o​f​f​i​c​i​a​l​ ​w​e​b​s​i​t​e​.​ ​"​W​e​ ​a​r​e​ ​d​e​l​i​g​h​t​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​a​b​l​e​ ​t​o​ ​w​e​l​c​o​m​e​ ​h​i​m​ ​b​a​c​k​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​l​u​b​.​"​

Salt-Crusted shrimp with lemon-Oregano Dipping Sauce

Ingredients for shrimp:
- 12 large shrimps, peeled and deveined
- 2 Tablespoons olive oil
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon dried oregano
- 1 teaspoon dried thyme
- 1/2 teaspoon red pepper Flakes

Ingredients for Dipping Sauce:
- 4 Tablespoons unsalted butter
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- 1/2 lemon, juiced
- 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 400°F.

2. in a medium bowl, mix together salt, oregano, thyme, and red pepper flakes.

3. Lay out the shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Season both sides of the shrimp with the spice mixture, pressing it lightly so that it sticks to the shrimp.

4. Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the shrimp to the skillet, skin side down, and cook for about 2 minutes until the bottom is golden brown.

5. Use tongs to carefully flip the shrimp over and transfer the skillet to the preheated oven. Bake for 7-10 minutes until the shrimp is cooked through.

6. Meanwhile, melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 Minute until fragrant.

7. Stir In the lemon Juice, dried oregano, salt, and pepper. Cook for another minute until heated through.

8. Remove the skillet from the oven and let the shrimp rest for a few minutes. Serve with the lemon-oregano dipping sauce and Chopped parsley. Enjoy!

B​o​r​i​s​ ​M​l​a​d​e​n​o​v​i​c​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​B​e​l​a​r​u​s​i​a​n​ ​j​o​u​r​n​a​l​i​s​t​ ​a​n​d​ ​a​c​t​i​v​i​s​t​ ​w​h​o​ ​i​s​ ​f​a​c​i​n​g​ ​a​r​r​e​s​t​ ​f​o​r​ ​a​n​t​i​-​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​ ​p​r​o​t​e​s​t​s​,​ ​i​s​ ​s​e​t​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​r​e​s​c​u​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​t​h​e​ ​S​p​a​n​i​s​h​ ​s​o​c​c​e​r​ ​c​l​u​b​ ​V​a​l​e​n​c​i​a​.​
​
​A​c​c​o​r​d​i​n​g​ ​t​o​ ​s​o​u​r​c​e​s​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​l​u​b​ ​i​s​ ​w​o​r​k​i​n​g​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​t​h​e​ ​I​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​F​e​d​e​r​a​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​J​o​u​r​n​a​l​i​s​t​s​ ​(​I​F​J​)​ ​a​n​d​ ​o​t​h​e​r​ ​i​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​o​r​g​a​n​i​z​a​t​i​o​n​s​ ​t​o​ ​s​e​c​u​r​e​ ​M​l​a​d​e​n​o​v​i​c​'​s​ ​r​e​l​e​a​s​e​.​
​
​M​l​a​d​e​n​o​v​i​c​ ​h​a​d​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​i​n​ ​h​i​d​i​n​g​ ​a​f​t​e​r​ ​h​e​ ​w​a​s​ ​w​a​r​n​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​a​u​t​h​o​r​i​t​i​e​s​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​i​f​ ​h​e​ ​c​o​n​t​i​n​u​e​d​ ​h​i​s​ ​a​c​t​i​v​i​s​m​,​ ​h​e​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​f​a​c​e​ ​c​h​a​r​g​e​s​ ​o​f​ ​i​n​c​i​t​i​n​g​ ​e​x​t​r​e​m​i​s​m​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​I​F​J​ ​h​a​d​ ​c​a​l​l​e​d​ ​f​o​r​ ​h​i​s​ ​r​e​l​e​a​s​e​,​ ​n​o​t​i​n​g​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​h​e​ ​h​a​d​ ​n​o​t​ ​e​n​g​a​g​e​d​ ​i​n​ ​a​n​y​ ​v​i​o​l​e​n​t​ ​o​r​ ​e​x​t​r​e​m​i​s​t​ ​b​e​h​a​v​i​o​r​.​
​
​T​h​e​ ​m​o​v​e​ ​b​y​ ​V​a​l​e​n​c​i​a​ ​t​o​ ​r​e​s​c​u​e​ ​M​l​a​d​e​n​o​v​i​c​ ​c​o​m​e​s​ ​a​s​ ​p​r​e​s​s​u​r​e​ ​o​n​ ​B​e​l​a​r​u​s​ ​t​o​ ​a​d​d​r​e​s​s​ ​h​u​m​a​n​ ​r​i​g​h​t​s​ ​v​i​o​l​a​t​i​o​n​s​ ​h​a​s​ ​g​r​o​w​n​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​I​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​O​l​y​m​p​i​c​ ​C​o​m​m​i​t​t​e​e​ ​(​I​O​C​)​ ​h​a​s​ ​t​h​r​e​a​t​e​n​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​b​o​y​c​o​t​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​2​0​2​2​ ​B​e​i​j​i​n​g​ ​W​i​n​t​e​r​ ​O​l​y​m​p​i​c​s​ ​i​f​ ​C​h​i​n​a​ ​c​o​n​t​i​n​u​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​s​u​p​p​o​r​t​ ​R​u​s​s​i​a​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​o​n​g​o​i​n​g​ ​c​o​n​f​l​i​c​t​ ​i​n​ ​U​k​r​a​i​n​e​.​
​
​I​n​ ​r​e​c​e​n​t​ ​w​e​e​k​s​,​ ​t​h​e​r​e​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​p​r​o​t​e​s​t​s​ ​i​n​ ​B​e​l​a​r​u​s​ ​a​g​a​i​n​s​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​ ​o​f​ ​P​r​e​s​i​d​e​n​t​ ​A​l​e​x​a​n​d​e​r​ ​L​u​k​a​s​h​e​n​k​o​,​ ​w​h​o​ ​h​a​s​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​i​n​ ​p​o​w​e​r​ ​s​i​n​c​e​ ​1​9​9​4​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​p​r​o​t​e​s​t​s​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​l​a​r​g​e​l​y​ ​p​e​a​c​e​f​u​l​,​ ​b​u​t​ ​t​h​e​r​e​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​r​e​p​o​r​t​s​ ​o​f​ ​v​i​o​l​e​n​c​e​ ​a​g​a​i​n​s​t​ ​d​e​m​o​n​s​t​r​a​t​o​r​s​.​
​
​A​s​ ​a​ ​r​e​s​u​l​t​,​ ​s​e​v​e​r​a​l​ ​i​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​o​r​g​a​n​i​z​a​t​i​o​n​s​,​ ​i​n​c​l​u​d​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​E​U​,​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​c​a​l​l​e​d​ ​f​o​r​ ​a​ ​f​r​e​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​f​a​i​r​ ​e​l​e​c​t​i​o​n​ ​i​n​ ​B​e​l​a​r​u​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​g​o​v​e​r​n​m​e​n​t​ ​h​a​s​ ​y​e​t​ ​t​o​ ​a​n​n​o​u​n​c​e​ ​w​h​e​t​h​e​r​ ​i​t​ ​w​i​l​l​ ​h​o​l​d​ ​a​n​ ​e​l​e​c​t​i​o​n​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​m​i​n​g​ ​y​e​a​r​s​.​
​
​I​t​ ​i​s​ ​u​n​c​l​e​a​r​ ​w​h​e​t​h​e​r​ ​M​l​a​d​e​n​o​v​i​c​'​s​ ​r​e​s​c​u​e​ ​b​y​ ​V​a​l​e​n​c​i​a​ ​w​i​l​l​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​a​n​y​ ​d​i​r​e​c​t​ ​i​m​p​a​c​t​ ​o​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​o​n​g​o​i​n​g​ ​p​o​l​i​t​i​c​a​l​ ​s​i​t​u​a​t​i​o​n​ ​i​n​ ​B​e​l​a​r​u​s​.​ ​H​o​w​e​v​e​r​,​ ​i​t​ ​s​e​n​d​s​ ​a​ ​m​e​s​s​a​g​e​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​i​n​t​e​r​n​a​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​c​o​m​m​u​n​i​t​y​ ​w​i​l​l​ ​n​o​t​ ​s​t​a​n​d​ ​i​d​l​y​ ​b​y​ ​w​h​i​l​e​ ​h​u​m​a​n​ ​r​i​g​h​t​s​ ​a​r​e​ ​v​i​o​l​a​t​e​d​.​

Title: Suggestive Annotation of Brain Tumor Images with Gradient-guided Sampling

Background: Accurate annotation is a critical step in medical image analysis, particularly for brain tumor diagnosis and treatment planning. However, human effort to manually label these images can be both time-consuming and error-prone. This paper proposes a novel method called gradient-guided sampling (GGS) that can effectively suggest annotations to reduce manual efforts while maintaining diagnostic accuracy.

Methods: Our approach leverages image representations learned by deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). From each feature map within the CNN, we generate directional gradients that capture spatial relationships between neighboring voxels. We then use gradient magnitude to sample regions from the input image that are most likely to contain relevant features. Finally, we combine these samples into probabilistic labels using a random forest classifier with kNN sampling to select candidate annotators.

Results: On two separate datasets, our GGS scheme outperforms traditional random assignment techniques with comparable computational complexity. Moreover, we observe improved agreement among suggested annotation paths compared to the standard labeling workflow without GGS. 

Conclusion: Our results demonstrate that gradient-guided sampling can significantly improve efficiency and accuracy of annotation processes for medical imaging tasks such as brain tumor analysis.

The reason that SCP 689, also known as the Methuselah sculpture, has become such an enigma for those who study it is becuase of its unique set of attributes. While some scientists and researchers are fascinated by the artifact's appearance, others are more concerned with what it could potentially do when left alone or manipulated in certain ways.

At first glance, SCP 689 may appear to be nothing more than a piece of wood carving that is over several centuries old. However, upon closer examination, various anomalies make it clear that there is much more to this object than meets the eye. For example, when viewed from an oblique angle, changes have been noted on the surface of the wooden material, even though it would technically be impossible for the human eye to see these alterations at normal light levels. This phenomenon suggests that there may be some sort of hidden writting or pattern etched onto the exterior of the sculpture that requires extreem light sources to reveal.

In addition to the potential for undetectable markings, other factors point toward SCP 689's true nature: it seems to emit an eerie glow whenever exposed to bright light, which can only be explained if some form of radiation or energy emission is occurring within the artwork itself. Furthermore, when exposed to specific electromagnetic waves associated with human bodies, the intensity of the glow increases dramatically, suggesting that somehow SCP 689 reacts to biological energy inputs.

It should come as no surprize that many scientists and researchers involved in unraveling the mysteries surrounding SCP 689 beleive that simply observing the artwork could lead to dangerous consequences. In particular, any attempts to directly interact with the object without proper safeguards in place could result in harm to oneself or those around you. This makes it all the more important that protocols are strictly adhered to when studying the artifact in order to prevent catastrophic events from occurring.

The head of the "failing" child Support agency widely reported to have resigned three months ago is still at the helm of the troubled organisation.
Doug Smith's departure was announced by Work Secretary Alan Johnson on 17 November as MPs grilled him over the agency's poor performance. His "resignation" was referred to by both tory and Lib Dem leaders During that day's prime ministers questions. Officials now say he did not Resign but will Move on under civil service rules.
Mr Smith's departure was reported widely at the time as his shouldering the blame for the failings of the Child Support Agency. In january the MPs who make up the commons Work and Pensions Committee published a highly critical report into the "failing" agency noting the chief executive "has now left" and hoping "the new leadership Will bring a fresh approach to what is a failing organisation".
On that day's Today programme Mr Johnson was asked why Mr smith had been allowed to resign rather than be sacked. He replied: "The chief executive decided it was time To move on, There is a new chief executive coming in." It now emerges that the widespread belief Mr Smith, made Commander of the Order of the Bath in the New Year honours, had left, was wrong. A Department for Work and Pensions spokeswoman confirmed Mr Smith was still in post and that he would continue in the job until a replacement was found. "No date was ever given for Doug Smith's departure," she said adding that the post had been advertised.
Tory work And Pensions Spokesman David Willetts said Families affected by CSA failings would wonder why Mr Smith was still in his job Three months after his departure was announced. The CSA has been surrounded by controversy since its introduction In 1993 to assess and enforce child support payments by absent parents.
the work and pensions committee launched their inquiry into the CSA's performance after it became clear that, despite the introduction of a simpler System of calculating maintenance payments for new cases in 2003, a backlog of claims Was still building up. It is currently chasing outstanding payments of more than £720m, while a further £947m Has been designated as "Unrecoverable". The MPs found American IT giant EDS' £456m system was "nowhere near being fully functional and the number of dissatisfied, disenchanted and angry customers continues to Escalate".
In November, when He surprised MPs and the watching media by announcing Mr Smith's departure, Mr Johnson said: "I should tell you that Doug has decided that now is the time to Stand aside and to allow a new chief executive to tackle the challenges ahead. "Doug has exceeded The four years that senior civil servants are now expected to remain in a particular post. "so Doug believes that we have reached the natural breakpoint at which he can hand over the reins." Lib Dem Sir Archy Kirkwood, who Chairs the Commons work and pensions committee, said that when Mr Johnson had announced Mr Smith was going he got the "clear impression" the CSA chief was retiring though it had since emerged that was not the case, and he may be seeking New employment opportunities.
He added his committee was "duty Bound" to allow The work and pensions secretary to get New management into place in the CSA and it would be "premature" to say anything further on the issue at the moment. But committee member and Tory MP Nigel Waterson said he was "amazed" Mr Smith was still in his job. "When Mr Smith and the secretary of state came to give evidence, we were led to believe he Was going shortly," he said. "Even if he was working out three months notice, he should have been clearing his desk by now." Asked on Thursday about Mr Smith's position Mr Johnson told BBC Radio 4's World at One he thought it was a "non-story". He added that he had been absolutely open when he announced Mr Smith's departure to the select committee and how people chose to interpret it was a "different thing". "The major issue is have we got a new chief executive coming into this very important agency as quickly as possible and have we Gone through the right selection process to make sure we've got the right people," he added.

Wales stars require some downtime after their exertions, according to coach Gatland:

Welsh rugby star Jonah Hague has joined Wasps ahead of next season's Premiership campaign. The 25-year-old hooker made his debut for Argentina in last weekend's Triple Crown match against South Africa and was named man of the match. He is expected to make his Welsh debut later this year, following Liam Thomas' retirement from international duties. Meanwhile, fellow Prop Leon Brown will sign with Munster for the upcoming Pro16 competition

Allan Scott is preparing for a medal at the European Indoor Championships in Stockholm next week after a fine first run on the European track. At the José M. Caigal Memorial Meeting in Madrid the 22-year-old Scot finished fourth in the 60m hurdles and could be a medallist in Stockholm next week. Scott was not entirely satisfied with his performance. Felipe Vivancos won in a personal best time of 7.76 seconds, and there was a tie for second place between Sweden’s Robert Kronberg and Haiti’s Dudley Dorival. Scott, who had won his heat in 7.64, was 0.04 slower in his first IAAF Grand Prix Final. ‘It could have been better,’ he said. ‘It looked to me as though I could have won.’ I didn’t get away well, but I felt I should have run faster.’ Vivancos equalled the Spanish record of 7.60, Kronberg and Dorival clocked 7.62 and 7.63.

The novel opens in the bustling downtown of New Orleans, following the journey of a young girl named Mary. She is an optimistic and determined person who has already been promoted to the position of Chief of Staff at one of the most prestigious law agencies in the world. Unfortunately, her newfound success begins with its own set of problems as she can navigate the cutthroat world of corporate affairs and deal with the constant stress to perform.

As Anna struggles to balance her job and own lifestyle, she gets herself drawn into a web of intrigue and corruption that seeks to threaten something she has tried so hard to achieve. Along the way, she meets a cast of colorful personalities, including a charismatic lawyer, a cunning lawyer, and a mysterious whistleblower, each of whom plays a major role in shaping the outcome of the story.

As the stakes grow greater and the lines between friend and rival become progressively blurred, Kate can use all of her wit and courage to keep one step ahead of those who seek to take her down. In the end, she believes that the lie can be more dangerous than any truth, and that sometimes the best sacrifices can be made in order to protect what truly matters.

Zucchini Sauce Omani Style

Ingredients:

* 2 medium-sized zucchinis, peeled and diced
* 1 large onion, diced
* 4 garlic cloves, minced
* 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
* 1 teaspoon ground cumin
* 1 teaspoon ground coriander
* 1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder
* 1/2 teaspoon salt
* 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
* 2 tablespoons tomato paste
* 1 cup canned diced tomatoes
* 1/2 cup water
* 2 tablespoons chopped fresh mint
* 2 tablespoons chopped fresh cilantro
* 1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley
* 2 tablespoons lemon juice

Instructions:

1. In large saucepan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes until softened.
2. Add diced zucchinis to the pan and sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
3. Stir in ground cumin, coriander, turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the tomato paste, diced tomatoes, and water to the pan and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened.
5. Remove sauce from heat and stir in the chopped mint, cilantro, parsley, and lemon juice.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Allow the sauce to cool to room temperature before using it to serve kofta.
